'''dhasuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickpoint|nickpoint]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickpoint|nickpoint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhasuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsihith|dhæsihith]] || [[word:dhæsihij|dhæsihij]] || [[word:dhæsihish|dhæsihish]] || [[word:dhæsihi|dhæsihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasusuhuth|dhasusuhuth]] || [[word:dhasusuhuj|dhasusuhuj]] || [[word:dhasusuhush|dhasusuhush]] || [[word:dhasusuhu|dhasusuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasuhuth|dhasuhuth]] || [[word:dhasuhuj|dhasuhuj]] || [[word:dhasuhush|dhasuhush]] || [[word:dhasuhu|dhasuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasufhuth|dhasufhuth]] || [[word:dhasufhuj|dhasufhuj]] || [[word:dhasufhush|dhasufhush]] || [[word:dhasufhuf|dhasufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasuhuthu|dhasuhuthu]] || [[word:dhasuhuju|dhasuhuju]] || [[word:dhasuhushu|dhasuhushu]] || [[word:dhasuhuku|dhasuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasuhuth|dhasuhuth]] || [[word:dhasuhuj|dhasuhuj]] || [[word:dhasuhush|dhasuhush]] || [[word:dhasuhu|dhasuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasuhuthul|dhasuhuthul]] || [[word:dhasuhujul|dhasuhujul]] || [[word:dhasuhushul|dhasuhushul]] || [[word:dhasuhukul|dhasuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasuhuthuthu|dhasuhuthuthu]] || [[word:dhasuhujuju|dhasuhujuju]] || [[word:dhasuhushushu|dhasuhushushu]] || [[word:dhasuhuku|dhasuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasuhuthun|dhasuhuthun]] || [[word:dhasuhujun|dhasuhujun]] || [[word:dhasuhushun|dhasuhushun]] || [[word:dhasuhukun|dhasuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasuhuthuoro|dhasuhuthuoro]] || [[word:dhasuhujuoro|dhasuhujuoro]] || [[word:dhasuhushuoro|dhasuhushuoro]] || [[word:dhasuhukuoro|dhasuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
